subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Most Exalted! This servant, who is linked to the name of the Supreme Beauty, the Most Exalted, and to the second part [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای غلام علی اعلی این غلام مضاف بنام جمال کبریاء علی اعلی و شطر ثانی از اسم
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
